response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Highly compatible; ReGLOSS covered 'Kokkara' and 'Superstar' with slight lyric alterations in 'Kokkara' (e.g., '足の向く方に 迷わずに動け' instead of 'oh しのごの言わずに動け' and '魂と 魂と 魂となる燃料' instead of '劣等も嫉妬も叱咤なる燃料').
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for transcription structure, with corrections made directly from live audio tokenization. Discarded the unsung parts of 'Kokkara'.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles mapped tightly to vocal activations; the silent text transition '数年後' was captured visually; rapid song pacing was solved with continuous sequential timestamps.

subtitles.original: Take it to the bridge!
subtitles.english: Take it to the bridge!

subtitles.original: 「俺、悪くない。なんも間違ってない」 自分じゃない何かのせいにしたい
subtitles.english: I'm not at fault, nothing's wrong. I want to blame it on something other than me.

subtitles.original: 天才じゃないの ダッセわかんなさい
subtitles.english: I'm not a genius, it's uncool, realize it already!

subtitles.original: これフィクションじゃない よく見なさい 天賦の才などない
subtitles.english: This is not fiction, look closely, there is no natural talent.

subtitles.original: でもやめられないみたい
subtitles.english: But I can't seem to stop.

subtitles.original: あたしゃ阿呆か 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: Am I a fool? I look like an idiot.

subtitles.original: 天才 こっから メラメラ まだまだ 自分で決めつけんな限界
subtitles.english: Genius? From here, burning hot, don't set your own limits yet!

subtitles.original: 探せお前の正解 本当の自分なんて居やしねぇよ
subtitles.english: Find your own answer, there is no such thing as your 'true self'!

subtitles.original: 高くならなきゃダメ 低くてはダメ って思い込んでることこそがダメ
subtitles.english: Thinking 'it must be high, it can't be low' is what's bad.

subtitles.original: 好きこそ物の上手なれで 次こそ終える根比べ
subtitles.english: What one likes, one will do well; next time will be the end of this test of endurance.

subtitles.original: I can't be someone else, oh I know, I know...
subtitles.english: I can't be someone else, oh I know, I know...

subtitles.original: このブレーキを壊したいの したいの
subtitles.english: I want to break this brake, I want to.

subtitles.original: 足の向く方に 迷わずに動け
subtitles.english: Move without hesitation in the direction your feet point.

subtitles.original: 道なき道ほど進め
subtitles.english: Advance especially down pathless roads.

subtitles.original: 魂と 魂と 魂となる燃料
subtitles.english: Our souls will become the fuel.

subtitles.original: Let it fire!
subtitles.english: Let it fire!

subtitles.original: 燃やすこの闘志 その鉄格子 ぶち壊し
subtitles.english: Burning this fighting spirit, breaking those iron bars.

subtitles.original: どうしようもないままが 自分なんだ こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Helpless as I am, that's who I am. It starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの童心もって 努力し 夢と相思相愛になれるはずなんだ
subtitles.english: Holding onto childhood innocence, working hard, we can surely fall in love with our dreams.

subtitles.original: こっから、こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: From here, it starts from here.

subtitles.original: 1, 2, 3, 4 順番通り 行ってないだけで 予定通り
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, 4, just because it's not in order doesn't mean it's not as planned.

subtitles.original: ローリン ローリン 転がってけ よりどりみどりの一生
subtitles.english: Rollin', rollin', keep on rolling, a life full of endless choices.

subtitles.original: 1, 2, 3, 4 順番通り 行行行 行ってないだけで 予定通り（予定通り）
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, 4, just because it's not in order doesn't mean it's not as planned.

subtitles.original: ローリン ローリン 転がってけ yo
subtitles.english: Rollin', rollin', keep on rolling.

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: It starts from here!

subtitles.original: 数年後
subtitles.english: A few years later

subtitles.original: Ah, ah... Ah, ah...
subtitles.english: Ah, ah... Ah, ah...

subtitles.original: I can’t see what’s behind those eyes
subtitles.english: I can’t see what’s behind those eyes

subtitles.original: Just wait, talk a little before they’re right
subtitles.english: Just wait, talk a little before they’re right

subtitles.original: 誰かの理想像に
subtitles.english: To someone else’s ideal image

subtitles.original: 耳を傾けてしまったの
subtitles.english: I tilted my ear

subtitles.original: I can't take it back, no more
subtitles.english: I can't take it back, no more

subtitles.original: I guess it’s too late to call it off

subtitles.english: Dance, dance...
